snippet.title: Reel trending 10 second video in 3 hours😳 how? | MUSKAN SHARMA
snippet.description:
Hi everyone!

This video is shot within 3 hours but the outcome is worth the time.😊

snippet.title: Padmaavat | Scene 11 | Deepika Padukone | Ranveer Singh | Shahid Kapoor
snippet.description:
Queen Padmavati is happily married to a Rajput ruler until a tyrant Sultan, Alauddin Khilji, enters their life and calls a war on their kingdom due to his obsession with the queen.

Padmaavat is a 2018 Indian Hindi-language epic period drama film directed by Sanjay Leela Bhansali. Based on the epic poem of the same name by Malik Muhammad Jayasi, it stars Deepika Padukone as Rani Padmavati, a Rajput queen known for her beauty, wife of Maharawal Ratan Singh, played by Shahid Kapoor. Sultan Alauddin Khilji, played by Ranveer Singh, hears of her beauty and attacks her kingdom to claim her. Aditi Rao Hydari, Jim Sarbh, Raza Murad, and Anupriya Goenka featured in supporting roles.

#Padmaavat #PadmaavatScenes #RanveerDeepika

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3169 - Jethalal Takes Bapuji on a Trip! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer

Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide

localized.title: NEW! Ep 3169 - Jethalal Takes Bapuji on a Trip! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
localized.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

---------

snippet.title: 15 മിനുറ്റിൽ 3 കറികളും കൂട്ടി ഒരു ഊണ് || Lockdown Menu || No Coconut || 3 Dishes in 15 minutes
snippet.description:
Hello dear friends, this is my 498th Vlog. In this video demonstrate How to make Easy Mutta Porichathum & Vanpayar Ularthu

How to make Easy Mutta Porichathum & Vanpayar Ularthu

Dry red  chillies - 6 nos
Small onion - 5 - 6 nos
Tamarind - 1 Lemon Size
Salt( according to taste )
Water
Coconut oil - 11/2  - 2 tbs
........................................................

Vanpayar Ularthu

Red cowpeas ( Perumpayar / vanpayar ) - 11/2 Cup
Turmeric powder - 1/2 tsp
Salt( according to taste )
Coconut oil - 11/2 tbs
Mustard Seeds - 1tsp
Dry red  chillies - 3 - 4 nos
Curry Leaves
Small onion - 8 nos   ( Crushed )
Garlic - 2 Big Flakes ( Crushed )
Big onion - 1 nos ( Half Sliced )
Crushed dry red chillies - 11/2 tbs
..........................................................


Mutta Porichathum

Coconut oil -  2 tbs
Curry Leaves
Eggs - 4 nos
Turmeric powder - 1/4 tsp
Coriander Powder - 11/2 tbs
Kashmiri chilli powder - 1 tbs
Salt( according to taste )
Vinegar - 1/2  -  1 tsp

localized.description:
Hello dear friends, this is my 498th Vlog. In this video demonstrate How to make Easy Mutta Porichathum & Vanpayar Ularthu

How to make Easy Mutta Porichathum & Vanpayar Ularthu

Dry red  chillies - 6 nos
Small onion - 5 - 6 nos
Tamarind - 1 Lemon Size
Salt( according to taste )
Water
Coconut oil - 11/2  - 2 tbs
........................................................

Vanpayar Ularthu

Red cowpeas ( Perumpayar / vanpayar ) - 11/2 Cup
Turmeric powder - 1/2 tsp
Salt( according to taste )
Coconut oil - 11/2 tbs
Mustard Seeds - 1tsp
Dry red  chillies - 3 - 4 nos
Curry Leaves
Small onion - 8 nos   ( Crushed )
Garlic - 2 Big Flakes ( Crushed )
Big onion - 1 nos ( Half Sliced )
Crushed dry red chillies - 11/2 tbs
..........................................................


Mutta Porichathum

Coconut oil -  2 tbs
Curry Leaves
Eggs - 4 nos
Turmeric powder - 1/4 tsp
Coriander Powder - 11/2 tbs
Kashmiri chilli powder - 1 tbs
Salt( according to taste )
Vinegar - 1/2  -  1 tsp

Please share your valuable feedback's through the comment box.
Don't forget to Like, Share and Subscribe. Love you all :)

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max.

snippet.title: Narendra Modi: 70 Best Moments as the PM Completes 7yrs in office!! | Deshbhakt with Akash Banerjee
snippet.description:
As Modi completes 7 years in office - and undoes the damage of 70 years of Congress rule - here are 70 gems from Modi that left us spellbound and stunned!!! 
It has been an eventful 7 years in office for PM Modi, from Demonetization, to GST, to Lockdown - the nation saw tremendous growth and technological advancement in the fields of cow science and electoral Bonds. Many promises were kept like doubling farmer income & propelling India towards a 5 trillion economy. Many visionary moves like 100 smart cities and bullet trains are rapidly nearing completion. Narendra Modi in the meantime only grows in popularity and his speeches and wise sayings are lapped up by the citizens - these 70 moments show how Modi has always been a visionary. 

Be inspired and inspire others by sharing.

snippet.title: മൗഗ്ലി ഒരു കില്ലാടി തന്നെ... നീന്താനും അറിയാം... മീനിന്റെ കുളത്തിൽ വീണ മൗഗ്ലി
snippet.description:
Hi guys,

This video features me and few of my lovely pets spending quality time in this pleasant climate. 

I’ve given 3 of my horses Majeed , Boney and Torque freedom to run around freely and have some fun.

Mougli unexpectedly fell into the fish pond, but nothing to worry he is safe.

I hope everything is going well and each of you are safe and healthy. 
Stay safe❤️


Instagram page:- https://instagram.com/petstationkannur?igshid=15153ol5qtzk5

Facebook page:- https://m.facebook.com/petstationkannur/

Door rha taaki tujhse judd sku
Yeh Khanjar mera aa K mujhe khud lagaa

snippet.title: Real Chocolate Recipe in Tamil | Chocolate making Trick | Perfect Homemade Chocolate Recipe
snippet.description:
In this video we will see how to make chocolate at home in tamil. This recipe makes perfect silky smooth chocolate. With this magic ingredient, you will be making perfect homemade chocolates. We can make these chocolates from cocoa butter or ghee or coconut oil and all of them tastes absolutely smooth and silky.

#ChocolateRecipe #HomemadeChocolate #ChocolateInGrinder

From Cocoa butter:
200g Cocoa butter
50g Milk powder
60 g Cocoa powder
200g Sugar

From Coconut Oil:
200g Coconut Oil
50g Milk powder
60 g Cocoa powder
200g Sugar

From Ghee:
200g Ghee
50g Milk powder
60 g Cocoa powder
200g Sugar

Pic taken from: https://chocolatealchemy.com/conching-and-refining
tags: how to make chocolate at home
how to make chocolate in grinder

snippet.description:
Anshul Garg Presents Khad Tainu Main Dassa by Selfie Queen Neha Kakkar & Gabru Rohanpreet Singh.


Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/khad-tainu-main-dassa
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/38SHGnYLRMQJ7MzaU6fkCl?si=zkNqWB2aSbCE3SIwsyuZeQ&utm_source=whatsapp

Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJPNMST6/
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=QyAUoGoiGPI&feature=share
Saavn: https://www.saavn.com/s/song/punjabi/Khad-Tainu-Main-Dassa/Khad-Tainu-Main-Dassa/MzwvBllqQQY?referrer=utm_medium=whatsapp&utm_source=whatsapp

Singer: Neha Kakkar & Rohanpreet Singh
Music: Rajat Nagpal
Lyrics: Kaptaan
Mixed by Rajat Nagpal 
Mastered by Naweed at Whitfield Mastering, London. 
Recorded by Rahul Sharma assist by Samir Dharap at Studio504 
Guitars & Strokes Shomu Seal
Featuring: Neha Kakkar & Rohanpreet Singh

Producer - Anshul Garg

Director - Agam Mann & Azeem Mann
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma
DOP - Shinda Singh 
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
DI Coloring- Onkar Singh 
Art Director - Rajan Art 
Choreographer - John
ADs - Ashish Uppal, Jass Panesar, Ravi Goyal, Prateek Bangia
Production - R S Film Production 
Associate Production - Jogi Productions
VFX - Inside Motion Pictures
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu

For Neha Kakkar: 
Make up: Ritika Vats
Hair: Kimberly Chu 
Stylist: Ruchi Kapoor 

For Rohanpreet Singh: 
Make up: Ritika Vats 
Stylist: Ruchi Kapoor

Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital
TRAVEL PARTNER - PRM HOSPITALITY PVT LTD

Lyrics : 


Tu viaah ton phln hor c ve hor hogeai
Sidha kio ni kehnda maitho bor hogea
Hun kihde tainu khaab laage aoun
Bina love u khe tu laagei soun ve khad tainu main dsa

Hun mainu puchda tu kaun ve khad tainu main dsa

Chalo mummy nu shkiyat teri laun ve khad tainu main dsa

J app kre galti jwaak bann janai
J maitho hoje fer mera baap bann janai
Kde bhola kde tu chlaak bann janai
Shreef kde kde badmash bann janai

App daily check krre mera fon
j main manga lagge nakhre dikhaun
khad tainu main dssa 
Main tere uche uche nakhreee 


J taitho mistake hoje mukkr jani ae
Gusse hoke gaddi vicho uttr jani ae
Main galti na galti j krdean
Chad fir mere sir uppr jani
 ae


Kaptaan change hogi teri tone 
app gora mnu aakhree  brown
khad tainu main dssa


Hun mainu puchda tu kon......

Tere uche uche nakhre chkkan ni khad tainu
main dssan
Mainu tavi mada kehndi teri maa ni khad tainu main dssan
#NehaKakkar #RohanpreetSingh #NehuPreet

snippet.title: সব Rejection-এর জবাব দিয়ে Housewife থেকে YouTube Star| @Soumali Adhikary  |Josh Talks Bangla
snippet.description:
⭐👇 আপনিও কি জীবনে বড় স্বপ্ন দেখেন? ⭐👇 সেই স্বপ্নগুলোকে আপনি সত্যি করতে পারেন নতুন App, Josh Skills-এর সাহায্যে! DOWNLOAD APP NOW: https://joshskills.app.link/LmxW5q2yx8



এক গ্রামের মেয়ে যাকে মা- বাবা ছোটবেলায় ফেলে রেখে গিয়েছিল 'বোঝা' মনে করে, আজ @Soumali Adhikary  লক্ষ্য লক্ষ্য মানুষের কাছে অতি পরিচিত YouTube Star

কিন্তু কিভাবে একজন সাধারণ মেয়ে, একজন সাধারণ Housewife থেকে হয়ে উঠলেন একজন Successful YouTuber?
একের পর এক Failure আর Rejection তাঁকে সাহায্য করেছে সফল হওয়ার জেদটা বজায় রাখতে।
Soumali আজ প্রথমবার জানিয়েছেন YouTube-এ Successful হওয়ার জন্য তাঁর Tips, সঙ্গে  Social Media Influencer হিসেবে তাঁর Income-ই বা কত
দেখুন এই Motivational কাহিনী Josh Talks Bangla-এর মঞ্চে



যদি আপনার কাহিনীও লক্ষ্য লক্ষ্য মানুষকে অনুপ্রাণিত করতে পারে, তবে আমাদের সাথে যোগাযোগ করুন এই মেইল আইডিতেঃ
soumik@joshtalks.com

Born and brought up in a village and an abandoned girl child by parents, today Soumali Adhikary is a popular YouTuber

But how from an ordinary girl, a very ordinary housewife Soumali became a YouTube star? From converting her every rejection and failure to her pillar of success, Soumali today discloses her secret tips to become a successful YouTuber

Explore this motivational talk by @soumali on Josh Talks Bangla

If your story too can inspire millions of people, reach out to us via this email id:

soumik@joshtalks.com




জোশ Talks প্রাথমিক ভাবে গল্প বলার একটা প্লাটফর্ম | একটু অন্যরকম গল্প | আমাদের আশেপাশে এমন প্রচুর মানুষ আছেন যারা তাঁদের নিজেদের ক্ষেত্রে আর সবার থেকে আলাদা এবং অসাধারণ কাজ করছেন | তারা তাঁদের কাজের মধ্যে দিয়ে নিজেদের মতো করে পরিবর্তন আনছেন সমাজে এবং বহু মানুষের জীবনে | রাজনীতি থেকে শুরু করে খেলাধুলো ,চলচ্চিত্র, নাটক, সামাজিক কর্মকান্ডে তারা ছাপ ফেলে যাচ্ছেন ক্রমাগত | যা শুরু হয়েছিল একটা শহরে একটা কনফারেন্স দিয়ে আজ সেটা কুড়ি টারও বেশি শহরে ছড়িয়ে পড়েছে | ১৫ মিলিয়ন দর্শক আজ জোশ Talks এর ভিডিও দেখছে ভারতের বিভিন্ন প্রান্তে এবং বাইরে | সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন জোশ Talks চ্যানেলে এবং নতুন ভিডিওর আপডেট পেতে বেল আইকন প্রেস করুন|

Josh Talks passionately believes that a well-told story has the power to reshape attitudes, lives, and ultimately, the world. We are on a mission to find and showcase the best motivational stories from across India through documented videos, motivational speeches, and live events held all over the country. Josh Talks Bangla aims to inspire and motivate you by bringing to you the best Bangla motivational videos. What started as a simple conference is now a fast-growing media platform that covers the most innovative rags to riches, struggle to success, zero to hero, and failure to success stories with speakers from every conceivable background, including entrepreneurship, women’s rights, public policy, sports, entertainment, and social initiatives. With 8 languages in our ambit, our stories and speakers echo one desire: to inspire action. Our goal is to unlock the potential of passionate young Indians from rural and urban areas by inspiring them to overcome the challenges they face in their careers or business and helping them discover their true calling in life.

-----**DISCLAIMER**-----
All of the views and work outside the pretext of the video, of the speaker, are his/ her own and Josh Talks, by any means, does not support them directly or indirectly and neither is it liable for it. Viewers are requested to use their own discretion while viewing the content and focus on the entirety of the story rather than finding inferences in its parts. Josh Talks by any means, does not amplify any specific ideology or propaganda.


#Rejection #Housewife #YouTubeStar #JoshTalksBangla

snippet.title: ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസും വൈറ്റ് ഫങ്കസും പിടിപെടാതിരിക്കാൻ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട പ്രധാനകാര്യങ്ങൾ.അറിവ് ഷെയർചെയ്യുക
snippet.description:
ഇന്ന് കോവിഡിനെക്കാൾ ഭയപ്പെടുന്ന രോഗമാണ് ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ്.
0:00 ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ്
2:00 കോവിഡ് രോഗികള്‍ക്ക് വരുന്നത് എന്ത് കൊണ്ട്?
3:00 ആര്‍ക്കൊക്കെ വരാന്‍ സാധ്യതയുണ്ട്?
4:09 എങ്ങനെ ഒഴിവാക്കാം?
6:00 മാസ്ക്ക് വില്ലനാകുന്നുണ്ടോ?
8:00 എങ്ങനെ തിരിച്ചറിയാം?

 കോവിഡ് കഴിഞ്ഞവർക്ക് എന്തുകൊണ്ട് ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ് രോഗം പിടിപെടുന്നു ? ബ്ലാക്ക് ഫങ്കസ് രോഗം ഒഴിവാക്കാൻ നാം ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട ചില പ്രധാന കാര്യങ്ങൾ എന്തെല്ലാം ? വിശദമായി അറിയുക. ഒരുപാടുപേർക്ക് ഉപകാരപ്പെടുന്ന ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ ആണിത് 

For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959

snippet.title: Sonu और Tappu को साथ देख Bhide को हुई Tension - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Sonu Ka Surprise
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Watch the full episodes of Sonu Ka Surprise: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7apv3AH-pijBqwwyS_x53aV

We bring to you the specially picked up episodes of "Sonu Ka Surprise". What does this series depict? Sonu who has been out due to something important is not seen in the Gokuldham for quite a long now. How does Tapu Sena manage to fulfill her absence? Watch to find out now.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: 1 किलो चिकन सुक्क आणि गावरान रस्सा परफेक्ट प्रमाणात रेसीपी। करा स्वतःचा बिझनेस, संपूर्ण माहिती
snippet.description:
1 किलो चिकन सुक्क आणि गावरान रस्सा परफेक्ट प्रमाणात रेसीपी। करा स्वतःचा बिझनेस, संपूर्ण माहिती

Ingredients / साहित्य -
Serves 6 
6 लोकांसाठी 

Chicken / चिकन 1 kilo 
Salt / मीठ 2 tsp. 
Turmeric / हळद 2 tsp
Oil / तेल 2 tbsp (30 ml) 
Chopped onion / चिरलेला कांदा 2 med (100gms)
Water / पाणी - 1 & 1/2 liter 

For masala / मसाला 

Black pepper / काळी मिरी 10-12
Cloves / लवंगा 10-12
Cinnamon / दालचीनी 1 inch
Cummin seeds / जिरे 2 tsp (10gms)
Corriander seeds / धणे 3 tsp (10gms)
Sesame / तिळ 2 tsp (10 gms) 
Dry coconut / सुके खोबरे 1/2 cup ( 80gms)
Sliced onion / कांदा - 4 big med (300gms) 
Garlic / लसुण 2 whole bunch (50gms)
Ginger /आले 2&1/2 inch (30gms) 
Green chillies / हिरव्या मिरच्या 3
Oil / तेल 3 tbsp (45ml)
Fresh coriander / कोथिंबीर handful (30gms)
Kashmiri red chilly pw / काश्मिरी मिरची पावडर - 3 tsp (15gms)
Kanda lasun masala / कांदा लसुण मसाला 4 tsp (20gms)

Making chicken & curry / चिकन आणि रस्सा साठी - 
Oil / तेल 5 tbsp (75 gms) 
Garam masala pw / गरम मसाला पावडर 1 tsp (5gms)
Corriander pw / धणे पूड 2 tsp (10 gms) 
Fresh corriander / कोथिंबीर 

#1किलोचिकनसुक्कआणिरस्सा
#1किलोसुक्कचिकनआणिरस्सा
#1kilosukhachickenaanirassa
#homemadechickenrassa
#1kilogavaranchickenrassa
#drychickenrecipe 
#chickencurry
#spicychickencurry
#झणझणीतगावरानसूखचिकनआणिरस्सा 
#सुक्कचिकन 
#gavranchicken
#गावरानचिकन
#homemadefoodbusiness
#chicken #nonveg #sundayspecial
tags: 1 किलो चिकन सुक्क आणि गावरान रस्सा
1 किलो प्रमाणात ऑर्डर साठी सुक्क चिकन आणि रस्सा
खाल्ल्यानंतर चव विसरणार नाही अस्सा गावरान झणझणीत गावरान चिकन रस्सा आणि सुख चिकन

localized.title: 1 किलो चिकन सुक्क आणि गावरान रस्सा परफेक्ट प्रमाणात रेसीपी। करा स्वतःचा बिझनेस, संपूर्ण माहिती
localized.description:
1 किलो चिकन सुक्क आणि गावरान रस्सा परफेक्ट प्रमाणात रेसीपी। करा स्वतःचा बिझनेस, संपूर्ण माहिती

Ingredients / साहित्य -
Serves 6 
6 लोकांसाठी 

Chicken / चिकन 1 kilo 
Salt / मीठ 2 tsp. 
Turmeric / हळद 2 tsp
Oil / तेल 2 tbsp (30 ml) 
Chopped onion / चिरलेला कांदा 2 med (100gms)
Water / पाणी - 1 & 1/2 liter 

For masala / मसाला 

Black pepper / काळी मिरी 10-12
Cloves / लवंगा 10-12
Cinnamon / दालचीनी 1 inch
Cummin seeds / जिरे 2 tsp (10gms)
Corriander seeds / धणे 3 tsp (10gms)
Sesame / तिळ 2 tsp (10 gms) 
Dry coconut / सुके खोबरे 1/2 cup ( 80gms)
Sliced onion / कांदा - 4 big med (300gms) 
Garlic / लसुण 2 whole bunch (50gms)
Ginger /आले 2&1/2 inch (30gms) 
Green chillies / हिरव्या मिरच्या 3
Oil / तेल 3 tbsp (45ml)
Fresh coriander / कोथिंबीर handful (30gms)
Kashmiri red chilly pw / काश्मिरी मिरची पावडर - 3 tsp (15gms)
Kanda lasun masala / कांदा लसुण मसाला 4 tsp (20gms)

Making chicken & curry / चिकन आणि रस्सा साठी - 
Oil / तेल 5 tbsp (75 gms) 
Garam masala pw / गरम मसाला पावडर 1 tsp (5gms)
Corriander pw / धणे पूड 2 tsp (10 gms) 
Fresh corriander / कोथिंबीर

snippet.title: Ramayana - Akshay The One (Official Music Video) | Big Indie Bang
snippet.description:
Akshay The One's Ramayana is a reflection of the times we live in, “Kaliyuga ka Aaina”. The music video looks straight out of a 90s video game where Akshay is seen to be fighting evil, but shows him clouded with his own ulterior motives. 

Streaming everywhere: 
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7zENxDCGvMVzgvaA1OYTDY?si=3e18600c67774c5e
Gaana: https://gaana.com/album/ramayana-2021
Wynk: https://wynk.in/u/aeRRr4ruG
YouTube Music https://music.youtube.com/playlist?list=OLAK5uy_lDhGQTwgj6Uxcdk_-ngcLkEr3jzvlav2A&feature=share
Apple Music : https://apple.co/3hIk89i
JioSaavn : https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/ramayana/MSYJf0ddewI
Amazon Music : https://amzn.to/3yBt2vB
Resso: https://m.resso.app/ZSJ5YDhR9/

Lockscreen Partner: Glance

A Last Bite Film.
Direction - Sanjna Krishnan, Rohan Shetty
Written by - Sanjna Krishnan & Rohan Shetty (Last Bite Films)
Cast: Akshay The One as ‘The One’, Ramesh as 'Simran'
Mix & Master: Abhishek Ghatak
Director of Photography - Rahul Accot
Offline Edit - Amarnath
Online Edit - Sanjna Krishnan
VFX - Sanjna Krishnan
Coloring - Vineesh Vijayan, Skwer Studios, Bombay
Art Director - Sanjna Krishnan
Art team - Rohan Shetty, Sai, Ambrish , Mukundha
Electrician - V Akmal
Casting director (Supporting cast) - Suhail Ahmed
Costumes - Sanjna Krishnan, Rohan Shetty
HMU - Raghuvaran, Orange Studios
Makeup assistant - Basava
Vanity - Jagadeesh
Line Producer - Hitesh Mohan
Assistant Line Producer - Michael MJ
Label Crew: Raghav Meattle (BGBNG Music)
Artist Manager: Jitesh Suvarna (Collective Artists Network)
Marketing Associates: Socio Spy Media
Performance Marketing: NetMedia

About Big Indie Bang:
Big Indie Bang is an incubator for new artists to take their music beyond their core fans to new markets, platforms and eventually, as a collective change the definition of ‘commercial music’ in India. Write to us at freshtunes(at)bgbng(dot)co

Follow Big Bang Music:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bgbngmusic​​
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bgbngmusic​​
Twitter: https://www.twitter.com/bgbngmusic​​
Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/bgbngmusic​

Follow Akshay The One:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/iamakshaydhawan
Twitter: https://twitter.com/iamakshaytheone
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/therealakshaydhawan/

Lyrics:
RAMAYANA RAMAYANA 
KALYUG KA HAI YEH AINA
RAMAYANA RAMAYANA 
KALYUG KA HAI YEH AINA

Huay jhoot bolne ke 
hum aadi
Muuh pe gaali chaddi 
hai maa ki
Pathron pe chadde doodh litre may
Bhooke sotte yahan bikhari
Bani eid ka chaand yeh sachai
Koina kisi ki chahay bhlaai
Ramayan kalyug ki hai yehi ki 
Yahan ram lakshman na hai bhaai

Show 
yeh karte hai jo
Na bilkul vaise yeh jooth may pro
Chehra pe chehra sajake yeh rakhe han 
Raavan ke dus thay aur inke hain saw
Maa baap ke na choote charan
Yahan rozz hotta seeta haran(rape)
Vo laakhon cheekhein lagati hai 
Par desh sotta jaise kumbhkaran. 

RAMAYANA RAMAYANA 
KALYUG KA HAI YEH AINA
RAMAYANA RAMAYANA 
KALYUG KA HAI YEH AINA

Baahar se hard andar se soft
Kya rakhein umeed murabbon se,
Jinhone payi hanuman si body
Protein ke daboon se

Har jgah maidaan jung ka
paise ke peechay banda hai andha 
Pooje mandir mein raam ko 
aur mann may saji hai raavan ki lanka

Bandi se meet kray 
Use karke de-lete kray 
saroopnakha si chorri kay liay 
seeta si biwi ko cheat kray

Chodd kar ke maa baap
Nikle ram seeta banwaas pe,
14 Chaw-da saal beetay kabke
vo bhule ghar jaate raste

RAMAYANA RAMAYANA 
KALYUG KA HAI YEH AINA
RAMAYANA RAMAYANA 
KALYUG KA HAI YEH AINA

#Ramayana #AkshayTheOne #BigIndieBang #HipHop #DesiHipHop #AkshayDhawan

snippet.title: தளர்வுகளற்ற முழு ஊரடங்கு - எவை எவைக்கு அனுமதி?|Tamil Nadu | TN Lockdown Updates | MK Stalin
snippet.description:
|#TamilNadu| #lockdown2021 | #TNGovt | #CoronaVirus | #Covid19 |

முழு ஊரடங்கு காலத்தில் மருந்தகங்கள், நாட்டு மருந்து கடைகள் இயங்க அனுமதி

பால் விநியோகம், குடிநீர் விநியோகம், தினசரி பத்திரிகை விநியோகத்திற்கு அனுமதி

காய்கறிகள் மற்றும் பழங்கள் உள்ளாட்சி அமைப்புகளுடன் இணைந்து வாகனங்கள் மூலமாக வழங்கப்படும்  

தலைமைச் செயலகத்திலும் மாவட்டங்களிலும் அத்தியாவசிய துறைகள் மட்டும் இயங்கும்

Watch now!.

Polimer News brings unbiased News and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

Polimer News has evolved as a 24 hours Tamil News satellite TV channel. Polimer is the second largest MSO in TN catering to millions of TV viewing homes across 10 districts of TN. Founded by Mr. P.V. Kalyana Sundaram, the company currently runs 8 basic cable TV channels in various parts of TN and Polimer TV, a fully integrated Tamil GEC reaching out to millions of Tamil viewers across the world. The channel has state of the art production facility in Chennai. Besides a library of more than 350 movies on an exclusive basis , the channel also beams 8 hours of original content every day. The channel has extended its vision to various genres including Reality. In short, Polimer is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Polimer’s biggest strength is its people. The channel has some of the best talent on its rolls. A clear vision backed by the best brains gives Polimer a clear cut edge in the crowded Tamil TV landscape.

snippet.title: STOP OVERTHINKING !! BUT HOW ? 5 EASY WAYS ज्यादा सोचना बंद करो कैसे  ? BY SeeKen
snippet.description:
HOW TO STOP OVERTHINKING ! THE POWER OF NOW BOOK SUMMARY IN HINDI BY SEEKEN 

FIND YOUR PASSION : https://www.seeken.org/passion

PERSONAL INSTAGRAM https://www.instagram.com/iamseeken/

overthinking is one of the most common problem in todays day and age. infact aap bol sakte ho ki aajke time pe more then 95% logo ka jo brain hai wo MONEY MIND hai. monkey kaise yaha waha uchalta hai vaisehi hamara brain bi yaha waha uchalta rehta hai. jo kai baar hame sleep problems deta hai. mujhe bi ye issue hota hai kai baar agar apko bi ye issue hota hai agar aap bi apne brain ko kai baar control nahi kar paate to fikar mat karo coz over thinking be kind of ek ADDICTION hai. jisse ladne se pehle hame samajna hoga ye kyu hota hai. agar apko kuch khane se LOOSE MOTION start ho to aap doctor k paas dawa k liye jaoge but usse bi pehle apko jo khake pait kharab ho raha hai wo khana band karna hoga. similarly yaha bi 3 reason batata hu jo apko ye problem de raha hai overthinking ka loose motion de raha hai. 

3 reasons 

1-future and ego
2- outer purpose vs inner purpose 
3- past and pain 

THIS ARE THE REASON YOU SHOULD STOP NOW 5 MEDICINE FOR THIS PROBLEM 

1- DO NEW THINGS 
2- SAY IT OUT LOUD 
3- WRITE DOWN YOUR THOUGTHS 
4- 
5- MEDITATION 

THANK YOU FOR READING.
tags: how to stop thinking too much
how to improve sleep at night

#EasyKuzhiPaniyaram
#EasyBreakfast
#EasyEveningSnacks

Ingredients 
`````````````````

water
oil -2 tbsp
garlic -1 tbsp
ginger -1 tsp
curry leaves -1-2 tsp
Onion -1

hing powder -1/4 tsp
Coriander leaves -2 tbsp
oil -2 -3 tbsp
`````````````````

snippet.title: क्यों है Bapuji गुस्से में?-Tarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah -तारक मेहता -Ep 3171 -21st May, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Episode 3171: Bapuji Reveals Popatlal's Name
---------------------------------------------------------
Jethalaal, Bapuji and Bagha reach the resort and try to contact Popatlal but Popatlal doesnt answer their call this irritates Bapuji and Bagghi. Jeethala then calms them down and  takes them to the reception. Bapuji learns that  there is no booking in the name of Popatlal and gets furious and reveals his name infront of the resort staff to know more watch the full episode.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile

 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: നിങ്ങളുടെ പ്രിയപ്പെട്ട അധ്യാപകർ ഒരുമിച്ച് ലൈവിൽ വരുന്നു | Entri വെർച്വൽ മാമാങ്കം Day 1
snippet.description: നിങ്ങളുടെ പ്രിയപ്പെട്ട അധ്യാപകരുടെ കാണാനായി നിങ്ങളുമുണ്ടകില്ലേ ഇന്നത്തെ ലൈവിൽ? Entri വെർച്വൽ മാമാങ്കത്തിൻ്റെ ആദ്യത്തെ സെക്ഷനായ മാസ്സ് മോട്ടിവേഷനിലൂടെ PSC പഠനം എങ്ങനെ മുന്നോട്ട് കൊണ്ടു പോകണമെന്നും സർക്കാർജോലി എന്ന സ്വപ്നം എങ്ങനെ നേടിയെടുക്കാണമെന്നും മനസ്സിലാക്കാം!!!

snippet.title: Filmymoji || Spirit Game || Middle Class Madhu || శవంతో సరదాగా || MCM
snippet.description:
Filmymoji || Spirit Game || Middle Class Madhu || శవంతో సరదాగా || MCM

Filmymoji releases Savam tho Saradaaga based on Middle Class Madhu’s childhood memories with Spirit game alias ouija board. It’s filmymoji first attempt at horror comedy. Middle class Madhu and Mahesh encounters a scary situation with the stray dogs in their street. During that night Middle class Madhu gets a scary dream. Following that night, the very next morning they get to hear about the death of Remo, a 108 year old ace PUBG player whose spirit tells about the hidden treasure to Middle class Madhu. Watch the full episode, to witness the treasure hunt heroics of MCM in this entertaining horror comedy flick.

#Filmymoji #MiddleClassMadhu #FilmymojiComedy #FilmymojiMiddleClassMadhu #SpiritGame #ouija #ouijaBoard  #TeluguComedy

About Sathiyam News :
Sathiyam also offers news based investigative shows such as Urakka Solvoem, Kuttram Kuttramae, discussion shows such as Sathiyam Saathiyamae, Kelvi Kanaigal & Adaiyaalam, public interest shows such as Pasumarathaani, Ivar Yaar, Uzhavan & Urimai Kural, satirical shows such as Mic Mayaandi and history based shows such as Varalaattril Indru & Varalaaru Pesukirathu.
We as a company have passion to reach out to the Tamil speaking population world over with the honest and responsible presentation of news and current affairs that reflects the true spirit of journalism and reported with authenticity, clarity and definitive conviction. This change we believe in turn will prepare our Nation to face the reality of truth and motivate its citizens to operate based on their individual decision.

Sathiyam is aiming to become a strong and competitive channel in the GEC space of Tamil Television scenario. Sathiyam’s biggest strength is its people. Sathiyam has also ventured into offering media based vocational education and training through its educational arm, Sathiyam Academy. Apart from these, Sathiyam runs a matrimonial service by the name MY BEST COMPANION.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

snippet.title: Manoj Bajpayee, Priyamani, Samantha Akkineni, Raj & DK Interview | The Family Man S2
snippet.description:
The interest around "Lonavala mein kaun tha" is baffling - The team behind The Family Man releasing on @Amazon Prime Video India, Manoj Bajpayee, Priyamani, Samantha Akkineni, Raj & DK, tell Anupama Chopra about what we can expect from Season 2, living up to the hype and excitement and how they got into the headspace of their characters.
Disclaimer: This interview was shot in January 2021.

#TheFamilyMan #RajDK #ManojBajpayee

Click on this link to continue to donate towards Film Companion's fundraiser for Mission Oxygen: https://www.ketto.org/fundraiser/film-companion-fundraiser-missionoxygen

00:00 - Manoj Bajpayee, Priyamani, Samantha Akkineni, Raj & DK speak to Anupama Chopra.
01:01 - Priyamani on the abrupt ending of The Family Man.
01:48 - Raj on 'Lonavla mein kya hua tha'.
03:25 - DK on the writing of Season 2.
03:51 - Manoj on how Srikant Tiwari is different in Season 2.
06:07 - Priyamani on relating a scene in her real life.
07:16 - Priyamani on working with Manoj.
07:56 - DK on the trick of shooting scenes.
08:22 - Manoj on difference being a bachelor and a married man.
09:41 - Samantha on her character in Season 2.
11:00 - Samantha on prepping for her role in Season 2.
11:52 - Raj and DK on Samantha's prep and performance.
13:14 - Raj and DK on casting.
15:04 - Raj and DK on Samantha's casting.
16:08 - Raj on Manoj Bajpayee in the film.
16:27 - Raj & DK on Shahrukh Khan.
17:00 - Manoj on shooting in Mira Road & Bhayandar.

Have you subscribed to Film Companion yet? Join us here - 
http://bit.ly/FCsubscribe

Follow Us On:
https://www.facebook.com/filmcompanion
https://www.twitter.com/filmcompanion
http://instagram.com/filmcompanion

The Film Companion is a web channel intended to promote Indian cinema through films review, interviews, discussions, video essays and analytical compilations. It is intended primarily for the purpose of encouraging informed discussions, criticism and review of cinema and towards such purpose the programs use short extracts of cinematograph films, sounds recording and photographic works. These clips and extracts are of a minimal nature and the use is not intended to interfere in any manner with their commercial exploitation of the complete work by the owners of the copyright. The use of works are in compliance with the fair dealing exception provided under Sec. 52 of the Copyright Act, and we assert our use of the works under the exception provided for criticism and review.

snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) 2021 MUSTER SOWOOZOO Announcement
snippet.description:
BTS 2021 MUSTER 소우주가 온라인 스트리밍 공연으로 개최됩니다.
📆 6월 13일(일)
📆 6월 14일(월) - WORLD TOUR VERSION 
(아티스트의 외국어곡 일부 포함)

BTS와 ARMY의 8주년을 기념하여 준비한 BTS 2021 MUSTER 소우주에 많은 관심 부탁드립니다!


BTS 2021 MUSTER SOWOOZOO will be held as an online live-streaming event. 
📆 June 13 (Sun)
📆 June 14 (Mon) - WORLD TOUR VERSION
(Includes some of the artist's foreign language songs)

We look forward to your enthusiastic interest in BTS 2021 MUSTER SOWOOZOO, which will be held in celebration of the 8th anniversary of BTS and ARMY.

snippet.title: Harano Sur - Full Episode | 20 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

SUBSCRIBE to Sun Bangla YouTube channel - http://bit.ly/2kviBbJ

snippet.description:

for business enquiries -7002321760{whatsapp} 
 Mail id - Jeet.43karmakar@gmail.com

Cast- jeet & jolly
directed  - jeet karmakar

Edit - Hrithik Mazumder

Song - Ya Ali
Film - Gangster- A Love Story
Singer - K.K., Abhijit, Sunidh Chauhan, Kavita Seth, Zubeen, James
Lyricist - Sayeed Quadri, Nilesh Mishra, Mayur
Music Director - Preetam
Artist - Imran Hashmi, Kangna Ranaut, Shiney Ahuja, Gulshan Grover

           Lyrics
Ya Ali
Rehem Ali
Ya Ali
Yaar pay qurban hai sabhi
Ya Ali madad Ali
Ya Ali yeh meri jaan yeh zindagi

Ishq pay haan
Mita du Luta du mai apni khudi
Yaar pay haan
Luta du mita du mai yeh hasti
Yaa Ali rehem Ali
Yaa Ali yaar pay qurban hai sabhi
Ya Ali madad Ali
Yaa Ali yeh meri jaan yeh zindagi

Mujhay kuch pal dai qurbat kay faqeer hum teri chahat kay
Rahey baychain dil kub tak milay kuch pal tou rahat kay
Chahat pay ishq pay haan mita du luta du mai apni khudi
Yaar pay haan luta du mita du mai yeh hasti

Ya Ali rehem Ali
Ya Ali yaar pay qurban hai sabhi
Ya Ali madad Ali
Ya Ali yeh meri jaan yeh zindagi

Bina teray na ek pal ho na bin teray kabhi kal ho

snippet.title: Alipur Weather Office forecast on Bengal weather| ধেয়ে আসছে ঘূর্ণিঝড়, রয়েছে বৃষ্টিপাতের সম্ভাবনাও
snippet.description:
Alipur Weather Office forecast on West Bengal weather| আগামী ২২শে মে নর্থ আন্দামান সমুদ্র এবং পূর্ব মধ্য বঙ্গোপসাগরের ওপর একটি নিম্নচাপ তৈরি হতে চলেছে। পরবর্তীকালে এটি আরেকটু শক্তি বাড়িয়ে ২৩ তারিখের মধ্যে ঘূর্ণিঝড়ে পরিণত হবে। ২৬ তারিখ এই ঘূর্ণি ঝড় উত্তর-পশ্চিম দিকে এগিয়ে অর্থাৎ পশ্চিমবঙ্গ এবং উড়িষ্যা উপকূলের দিকে যাবে। ২৫ তারিখ সন্ধ্যা বেলার পর থেকে পশ্চিমবঙ্গের উপকূলের জেলাগুলোতে হালকা থেকে মাঝারি বৃষ্টি এবং ২৫ তারিখের পর থেকে বৃষ্টির পরিমাণ বাড়বে। জানালেন আলিপুর হাওয়া অফিসেরউপমহা-নির্দেশক সঞ্জীব বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়।

#WeatherofBengal #KolkataWeather #WestBengalWeather


About the Channel:

Keeping traditionalism with the flavor of Hilsha and Prawn, the festivities of Durga Puja, we have induced the new age concept of digital journalism for our Bengali readers all across the globe. Being part of Aajtak.in, India Today Group Digital, we introduce ourself as bangla.aajtak.in. We will cater to all avenues in the field of journalism from North Bengal to South Bengal, Hills to the Deltas of Sundarban. Our focus would be to bring to you the latest happenings from Bengal to the entire world, be it political, culture, sports, entertainment, or viral. We are always here to bring every detail to your fingertips. Not only West Bengal, by Bengal we mean the entire Bengali as a whole along with news from Bangladesh and Tripura. So, don't waste your time, state updated with us, everywhere, every-time.

বাংলা আমার সর্ষে ইলিশ চিংড়ি কচি লাউ, বাংলা পারশে মাছ কে ধুয়ে জিরের বাটায় দাও, বাংলা ভুলি কি করে, বাংলা বুকের ভিতরে। বাংলার এই ফ্লেভারকে নিয়েই আমরা আজতক বাংলা ডট ইন হাজির হয়েছি আপনাদের কাছে। আমরা আজতক ডট ইন, ইন্ডিয়া টুডে গ্রুপ ডিজিটালের নবতম সদস্য হিসেবে আত্মপ্রকাশ করেছি। বাংলার পাঠকদের কাছে গোটা বিশ্বের প্রতি মিনিটের প্রতিটা আপডেট আমরাই তুলে ধরব সবার আগে। দক্ষিণবঙ্গ থেকে উত্তরবঙ্গ, পাহাড় থেকে শিল্পাঞ্চল, ডুয়ার্স থেকে সুন্দরবন আমাদের চোখ রয়েছে সর্বত্রই। কী চলছে রাজ্য রাজনীতিতে? কেন্দ্রই বা কী বলছে? উত্তর দেব আমরাই। বাদ যাবে না ময়দানের লড়াই থেকে সেলেবের অন্দরমহল। থাকছে সাহিত্য থেকে সংস্কৃতি, ইউটিলি থেকে অর্থনীতি, এমনকী পড়শি বাংলাদেশের প্রতিটা আপডেটও। তাই প্রতি মুহূর্তে, খবরে থাকতে চোখ রাখতেই হবে আজতক বাংলা ডট ইনের পেজে।

Follow Us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/AajTakBangla/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/AajTakBangla
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/aajtakbangla/

snippet.description:

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3171 - Jethalal Arrives At Resort! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

snippet.title: Lil Nas X - SUN GOES DOWN (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official video for “SUN GOES DOWN” by Lil Nas X
 
Listen & Download “SUN GOES DOWN” out now: https://lilnasx.lnk.to/SunGoesDown
  
Amazon Music - https://lilnasx.lnk.to/SunGoesDown/amazonmusic
Apple Music - https://lilnasx.lnk.to/SunGoesDown/applemusic
Audiomack - https://lilnasx.lnk.to/SunGoesDown/audiomack
Deezer - https://lilnasx.lnk.to/SunGoesDowndeezer
iTunes - https://lilnasx.lnk.to/SunGoesDown/itunes
SoundCloud - https://lilnasx.lnk.to/SunGoesDown/soundcloud
Spotify - https://lilnasx.lnk.to/SunGoesDown/spotify
YouTube Music - https://lilnasx.lnk.to/SunGoesDown/youtubemusic

Directed by Lil Nas X & Psycho Films
Written by Lil Nas X
Creative Director/Stylist: Hodo Musa
EP: Sam Canter & Jack Begert
Producer/Commissioner: Saul Levitz
Producer: Geenah Krisht
Production Company: Psycho Films
DP: David Bolen
Editor: Neal Farmer & Jack Begert
VFX: BUF
Addtl. VFX: Justin Johnson & Neal Farmer
Color: Paul Yacono
Brand Integration Experts: Jennifer Frommer, Hannah Satzke

I wanna run away
Don’t wanna lie, I don’t want a life
Send me a gun
And I’ll see the sun 

I’d rather run away
Don’t wanna lie, I don’t want a life
Send me a gun
And I’ll see the sun 

You need an instant ease
From the life where you got plenty
Of every hurt and heartbreak
You just take it all to the face 

I know that you want to cry
But it’s much more to life than dying
Over your past mistakes
And people who threw dirt on your name 

Since ten, I been feeling lonely
Had friends but they was picking on me
Always thinking why my lips so big?
Was I too dark? Can they sense my fears?

These gay thoughts would always haunt me
I prayed God would take it from me
It’s hard for you when you’re fighting
And nobody knows it when you’re silent 

I’d be by the phone
Stanning Nicki morning into dawn
Only place I felt like I belonged
Strangers make you feel so loved, you know? 

And I’m happy by the way
That I made that jump, that leap of faith
I’m happy that it all worked out for me
Imma make my fans so proud of me, (ohhhh)

I wanna run away
Don’t wanna lie, I don’t want a life
Send me a gun
And I’ll see the sun 

I’d rather run away
Don’t wanna lie, I don’t want a life
Send me a gun
And I’ll see the sun 

You need an instant ease
From the life where you got plenty
Of every hurt and heartbreak
You just take it all to the face 

I know that you want to cry
But it’s much more to life than dying
Over your past mistakes
And people who throw dirt on your name 

oooohhh
hoooahh
unooooh

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 110
snippet.description:
Soumya heaves a sigh of relief and asks Harman to take her home after their ordeal with the goons. Meanwhile, Nimmi puts her foot down and challenges the veiled woman, who arrives at the house in search of Soumya. Later, the veiled woman goes to Harman's house and warns his family that they should accept Soumya as their daughter-in-law, if Harman brings her home.

#ColorsRishtey #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bxRAKAf77tUWcNIEnPEeB-b

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.
